scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend,nlp -c blue,green,magenta "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:nlp"
scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend/nlp-summarization && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.check:all: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend:test && npm run check:frontend:lint
